title: Add an automation that moves a board to another folder on status change
excerpt: We have a lot of boards (150+) so use folders to organise them.  It would be really useful if we could move boards between folders using automations on status change, e.g. when status changes from ‘Proposal’ to ‘Live’ mo…

posts.author: RachaelRainbow (Rachael Rainbow)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a lot of boards (150+) so use folders to organise them. It would be really useful if we could move boards between folders using automations on status change, e.g. when status changes from ‘Proposal’ to ‘Live’ move the board from the ‘Proposals’ folder to the ‘Live jobs’ folder. At the moment we have to drag them manually.

I see this has been raised previously:

Is there a way to move a board from a folder to another folder upon a time trigger? Platform discussions
Hi, I want to create 2 folders of boards. The first board of tours that will happen, and the next one for tours of the past. Can I set a trigger for moving boards from a folder to another, in the same way an item moves between 2 groups, upon a past-date trigger ? Thank you for your help

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be really helpful for the Portfolio feature as well. If we’ve lost a deal, we need to be able to move the linked board to a ‘Dead Deals’ folder. Right now, the team just change the status but they forget to move the linked board.

posts.author: NJE44 (Elizabeth K Coccia)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any movement on this? I was just asked something similar - when a status changes from New to Pending - move the board into a folder so the next person can take over
